data.title: RAVE broke through $2.1, surging over 100% intraday and more than 700% in three days.
data.description: Market data shows that RAVE has broken through $2.1 and is currently trading at $2.09, up more than 100% on the day and more than 700% in three days.

data.title: Eurozone's Oil Price Sensitivity Exceeds That of the U.S., Bank of America Reports
data.description: The Eurozone exhibits a significantly higher sensitivity to oil price fluctuations compared to the United States, according to a report by Bank of America. The study reveals that a 10% increase in oil prices results in an inflation impact of approximately 40 basis points and a growth impact exceeding 10 basis points in the Eurozone. These effects are roughly double those observed in the U.S. According to Jin10, the report attributes this heightened sensitivity to the larger share of energy in the European consumer basket and the region's status as a net importer of oil.

data.title: Vance leads US negotiating delegation to Pakistan
data.description: A U.S. negotiating delegation led by Vice President Vance arrived at the Nur Khan Air Force Base in Rawalpindi, a city near Islamabad, the capital of Pakistan, on the 11th. (Xinhua)

data.title: Solana Spot ETFs See Significant Inflows Amid Market Activity
data.description: U.S. Solana spot ETFs experienced a notable increase in net inflows, totaling $11.453 million yesterday. According to NS3.AI, the Bitwise Solana Staking ETF was the sole fund contributing to these net inflows, highlighting its appeal among investors.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Baidu Smart Cloud Launches Embodied Intelligence Data Marketplace
data.description: On April 11, Baidu Smart Cloud announced the launch of its Embodied Intelligence Data Marketplace (Beta version) in collaboration with several embodied intelligence companies, including Ling Sheng Technology, Fourier, Wei Tai Technology, Tuo Yuan Wisdom, Shu Tu Technology, and Song Ying Technology. According to Jin10, this marketplace introduces a pioneering hierarchical and scalable data labeling system designed to accelerate the large-scale implementation of embodied intelligence. Currently, Baidu Smart Cloud is providing services to over 30 embodied intelligence enterprises, including Zhi Yuan and Yu Shu.

data.title: XRP's Potential Recovery Amid Market Indicators
data.description:
XRP has been experiencing an eight-month downtrend, with momentum and on-chain indicators reaching levels that have historically aligned with macro bottoms. According to Cointelegraph, data from TradingView shows that the relative strength index (RSI) of the XRP/BTC ratio is at 24, marking the most oversold level since October 2025. Historically, such low RSI levels have signaled market bottoms for the ratio, leading to significant XRP price breakouts against Bitcoin, as observed in late 2024 and 2025.

The XRP/BTC pair is currently trading within a long consolidation range, which has previously served as a strong launching pad for the ratio. The last significant bottom for XRP against Bitcoin in this zone occurred in June 2025, initiating a 61% increase in the XRP/BTC ratio and a 92% XRP price rally to a multi-year high of $3.66. Other instances highlighted by the yellow bars in the chart further emphasize the reliability of this level in marking macro bottoms for XRP/BTC.

The MVRV Z-score for XRP is near zero, a level that historically aligns with accumulation zones and market bottoms. This suggests that most holders are close to breakeven, reducing sell pressure and indicating potential downside exhaustion. Similar patterns were observed in 2021, 2022, and 2024 before major rallies. Notably, the last time XRP’s MVRV Z-score fell to similar levels in late 2024, it coincided with a macro market bottom at $0.30 and preceded a multi-month rally, with the XRP/USD pair rising 500% to a multi-year high above $3.

Currently, the 0.80 MVRV pricing band, which has historically marked cycle bottoms, is at $1.14, coinciding with a 15-month low reached on February 6. These on-chain metrics suggest that XRP is undervalued and may continue its recovery, potentially rising toward $1.70 or higher. Meanwhile, XRP/USD remains cautiously bullish as long as it holds the $1.25-$1.30 support zone. A trader noted that if this zone continues to hold, a short-term bounce towards $1.45 is possible.

The importance of this support level is reinforced by cost basis distribution, with nearly 1.73 billion XRP acquired around this price. Below this, the next line of defense is the $1.15 demand zone, where the 200-week simple moving average is located. If XRP/USD drops below this level, it could fall toward the bear flag target of $0.80, or 41% below the current price. As Cointelegraph reported, maintaining the $1.27-$1.30 range would indicate strength among the bulls, who must push the XRP/USD pair toward the $1.61 range high to regain control.

data.title: Selini Capital is suspected of withdrawing $5.64 million worth of WLD from Binance in the past 24 hours.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, Selini Capital (0x82E...1db8) is suspected to have withdrawn a total of 20 million WLD tokens from Binance in the past 24 hours, worth $5.64 million.

data.title: Air India Faces Operational Challenges Amid Record Losses, Says Tata Sons Chairman
data.description: Air India is currently experiencing significant operational challenges and record losses, according to Tata Sons Chairman Natarajan Chandrasekaran. Bloomberg posted on X that Chandrasekaran addressed employees on Friday, highlighting the difficulties the airline is facing in its efforts to improve performance and rectify ongoing issues. The carrier is working to overcome these hurdles as it seeks to stabilize its operations and financial standing.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $64.9489 million yesterday, while BlackRock's ETHA saw a net inflow of $53.6982 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $64.9489 million yesterday (April 10th, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was BlackRock ETF ETHA, with a net inflow of $53.6982 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $11.731 billion. This was followed by BlackRock Stalled ETH ETF ETHB, with a net inflow of $8.1043 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $377 million. The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was Fidelity ETF FETH, with a net outflow of $561,000, bringing its historical total net inflow to $2.229 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF is $12.965 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) is 4.76%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $11.668 billion.

data.title: The US Solomon Islands (SOL) spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $11.453 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the SOL spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $11.453 million yesterday (April 10th, Eastern Time). Only the Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL) saw net inflows yesterday, with a single-day net inflow of $11.453 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $789 million. As of press time, the SOL spot ETF has a total net asset value of $828 million, a net asset value ratio of 1.69%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $975 million.

data.title: The Kingdom of Bhutan has reduced its Bitcoin holdings by 70% within 18 months, and may have already ceased Bitcoin mining activities.
data.description: The Bhutanese government transferred approximately 319.7 bitcoins (worth $22.68 million) to two addresses on Thursday, with 250 bitcoins going to wallets that had previously routed funds to Galaxy Digital and OKX. Bhutan's holdings have decreased from approximately 13,000 bitcoins in October 2024 to 3,954 bitcoins currently, worth about $280.6 million, a 70% reduction in 18 months. So far this year, $215.7 million worth of bitcoins have been transferred out of Bhutan's holdings. Furthermore, mining pools in the country have not recorded more than $100,000 in bitcoin inflows for over a year, suggesting that its hydroelectric-powered bitcoin mining operations may have slowed or ceased.

data.title: Authoritative Pakistani government official: The form of US-Iran negotiations remains uncertain.
data.description: A Pakistani government official said on the 11th that although the United States and Iran have confirmed that negotiations will be held that day, the format of the talks is still uncertain. The official said that the US and Iran have made various arrangements for the negotiations, including both face-to-face and back-to-back formats. Pakistan is also prepared to facilitate both face-to-face negotiations and back-to-back negotiations, with Pakistan acting as an intermediary to relay information. (Xinhua)

data.title: Bhutan's Bitcoin Mining Activities May Have Slowed Amid Economic Pressures
data.description: Bhutan may have halted or reduced its Bitcoin mining operations after selling 70% of its Bitcoin holdings. According to Foresight News, this move contrasts with other major institutions and sovereign nations that are increasing their cryptocurrency and gold reserves. Bhutan's hydropower is reportedly being redirected to supply electricity to neighboring India rather than being used for Bitcoin mining. Economic pressures, along with declining Bitcoin prices, increased network difficulty, and halving pressures, are squeezing mining profitability. As of now, Druk Holding and Investments, the sovereign wealth fund managing Bhutan's Bitcoin assets, has not publicly commented on any asset transfers or the status of its mining operations.

data.title: A whale controlling 59% of the circulating supply of NOM has transferred a total of 1.442 billion NOM tokens to Binance.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, in the past half hour, a whale or institution controlling 59% of the circulating supply of NOM continued to transfer 768 million NOM, worth $3.73 million, to Binance. Since last night, this entity has cumulatively transferred 1.442 billion NOM to Binance, worth $7.67 million. The price of NOM has fallen by 39% in the last 24 hours.

data.title: Iranian media releases composition of Iranian negotiating delegation
data.description: The Iranian delegation, scheduled to negotiate with the United States that day, consisted of 71 people, including the main negotiating team, expert team, media representatives, and protocol and security personnel. The report stated that the Iranian delegation was led by Iranian Parliament Speaker Qassem Ghalibaf, and included Foreign Minister Araghchi, Central Bank Governor Abdulnasser Hemmati, and Defense Council Secretary Ali Akbar Ahmadian. The report also noted that Deputy Foreign Minister Gharibabadi, Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Baghae, Deputy Director of Foreign Policy Ali Bagheri Qani of the Supreme National Security Council Secretariat, Member of Parliament Saeed Mahmoud Nabawiyan, Speaker's Assistant for International Affairs Abufazl Amoui, and Speaker's Strategic Advisor Mehdi Mohammadi were also on the delegation. The report further stated that the US delegation numbered 300, a significant portion of whom were part of the security, guard, and protocol teams. (Xinhua)

data.title: Iranian Delegation of 71 Members to Engage in U.S. Talks
data.description: A 71-member Iranian delegation is set to engage in negotiations with the United States. According to Odaily, the delegation includes key figures such as Iran's Islamic Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi, Central Bank Governor Abdolnaser Hemmati, and Defense Committee Secretary Ali Akbar Ahmadian. Other notable members include Deputy Foreign Minister Gharibabadi, Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Baghaei, Deputy Director of Foreign Policy at the Supreme National Security Council Ali Bagheri Kani, parliamentarian Seyed Mahmoud Nabavian, Speaker's Assistant for International Affairs Abolfazl Amouei, and Strategic Advisor Mehdi Mohammadi. The U.S. delegation reportedly comprises 300 members, with a significant portion dedicated to security, guard, and protocol teams.

data.title: Bitdeer currently maintains zero holdings and sold 165 BTC this week.
data.description: Bitdeer, a Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company, released its latest Bitcoin holdings data on the X platform. As of the week ending April 10, its Bitcoin mining output was 165 BTC, but it sold 165 BTC during the same period, resulting in a net increase of 0 BTC. It currently maintains a zero Bitcoin holding.

data.title: Arthur Hayes Warns of Potential Federal Reserve Intervention in Private Credit Market
data.description: Arthur Hayes has highlighted concerns regarding the approximately $1.8 trillion private credit market, suggesting that stress within this sector could necessitate a liquidity intervention by the Federal Reserve. According to NS3.AI, Hayes noted that regulators are currently scrutinizing the exposure of banks and insurance companies as the sector faces rising redemptions and an increase in non-performing loans.

data.title: Global Economy's Oil Dependency Declines Since 1970s, Bank of America Reports
data.description: On April 11, Jin10 reported that a Bank of America research note dated April 10 highlighted a significant reduction in the global economy's dependency on oil since the 1970s. According to Jin10, the amount of oil required to produce the same scale of GDP today is only one-third of what was needed in the 1970s. The OPEC crisis and subsequent oil shocks were once considered severe stagflation events. However, the current economy is more resilient to similar energy shocks.
